parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ system_instruction: { parts: [{ text: $json.systemPrompt }] }, contents: $json.contents, generationConfig: { temperature: 0.4, maxOutputTokens: 1024 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.first().json.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text || '';
return [{ json: { reply: raw.trim() } }];
